ai-1.en: Tell us about the first time AI felt real at work.

ai-2.en: Tell us about a task that changed.

ai-3.en: Tell us about a moment you felt behind.

ai-4.en: Tell us about a moment you felt ahead.

ai-5.en: Tell us about something you tried quietly.

ai-6.en: Tell us about a tool that surprised you.

ai-7.en: Tell us about a conversation you avoided.

ai-8.en: Tell us about a time you asked for help.

ai-9.en: Tell us about work you were proud of.

ai-10.en: Tell us about work that drained you.

ai-11.en: Tell us about a shortcut that helped.

ai-12.en: Tell us about a shortcut that felt wrong.

ai-13.en: Tell us about a skill you fought to learn.

ai-14.en: Tell us about a skill you now take for granted.

ai-15.en: Tell us about a decision that needed a person.

ai-16.en: Tell us about a mistake that taught you something.

ai-17.en: Tell us about feedback that stayed with you.

ai-18.en: Tell us about someone who makes work better.

ai-19.en: Tell us about a day when work felt meaningful.

ai-20.en: Tell us about a day when work felt pointless.

ai-21.en: Tell us about a part of your job people do not see.

ai-22.en: Tell us about something you wish we did less.

ai-23.en: Tell us about something you wish we had time for.

ai-24.en: Tell us about a moment you felt trusted.

ai-25.en: Tell us about a moment you felt checked.

ai-26.en: Tell us about something you do the long way.

ai-27.en: Tell us about something you would gladly give away.

ai-28.en: Tell us about something you would miss doing.

ai-29.en: Tell us about a question you keep returning to.

ai-30.en: Tell us about a fear that has changed shape.

ai-31.en: Tell us about a hope that has changed shape.

ai-32.en: Tell us about what "good work" meant to you before.

ai-33.en: Tell us about what "good work" means to you now.

ai-34.en: Tell us about a boundary you learned from experience.

ai-35.en: Tell us about a promise a team kept.

ai-36.en: Tell us about a promise a team broke.

ai-37.en: Tell us about the story you hope we can tell later.
